summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureImage Forge Phase 4 features: Exception Management, Drift Detection, and Remediation Policies. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including navigation, page loads, modals, and interactive elements.
critical_code_review_comments: K8s runtime images are MOCKED - simulate_k8s_runtime_images() returns simulated data
Drift detection compares simulated images against registered templates with simulated digests
Webhook delivery is logged but not actually sent to external endpoints
Default remediation policies are returned when no custom policies exist in DB
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Created test data with TEST_ prefix during testing: TEST_build_*, TEST_Policy_*, TEST_Activate_*, TEST_workflow_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints tested: GET/POST /api/exceptions, GET /api/exceptions/templates, POST /api/exceptions/{id}/approve, POST /api/exceptions/{id}/reject, GET /api/drift/runtime-images, GET /api/drift/scan, GET /api/drift/history, GET /api/drift/stats, GET /api/remediation/policies, POST /api/remediation/policies, POST /api/remediation/policies/{id}/activate, POST /api/builds/{id}/auto-remediate-with-policy. Frontend tested: Dashboard with nav links (Exceptions, Drift, Auto-Fix), Exceptions page with stats/filters/list/create modal, Drift Detection page with tabs (Dashboard/Images/History) and Run Drift Scan button, Remediation Policies page with stats/active policy banner/policies list/mode comparison/create modal.

exception_management.create_exception: PASS - creates pending exception with ID
exception_management.approve_exception: PASS - sets status to approved with expires_at
exception_management.reject_exception: PASS - sets status to rejected with reason
exception_management.filter_by_status: PASS - filters exceptions by status parameter
exception_management.ui_exceptions_page: PASS - page loads with stats, filters, list
exception_management.ui_create_modal: PASS - modal opens with all form fields

drift_detection.get_runtime_images: PASS - returns simulated K8s images with clusters
drift_detection.run_drift_scan: PASS - returns scan results with summary (total/compliant/drifted/critical)
drift_detection.drift_results_structure: PASS - results have has_drift, risk_level, drift_details
drift_detection.ui_drift_page: PASS - page loads with stats and tabs
drift_detection.ui_run_scan_button: PASS - triggers scan and shows results
drift_detection.ui_images_tab: PASS - shows monitored runtime images with status badges
drift_detection.ui_history_tab: PASS - shows scan history with drifted/critical counts

remediation_policies.get_policies: PASS - returns policies list with active_policy
remediation_policies.policy_modes: PASS - all policies have valid modes (strict/graceful/notify_only)
remediation_policies.create_policy: PASS - creates new policy with ID
remediation_policies.activate_policy: PASS - activates policy and disables others
remediation_policies.remediation_stats: PASS - returns stats with CVE database info
remediation_policies.ui_policies_page: PASS - page loads with stats, active banner, policies list

mocked_services_note: K8s API is simulated (simulate_k8s_runtime_images). Drift detection uses simulated digests. Webhooks are logged but not delivered. Default policies returned when DB is empty.
